wine_bars.name: Tabanco El Pasaje
wine_bars.address: Calle Santa Maria 8, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Traditional tabanco serving Manzanilla, Fino, Oloroso and Pedro Ximenez straight from the cask; rotating Jerez bodegas on tap including Lustau and Valdespino expressions
wine_bars.description: A long-running Jerez tabanco, El Pasaje operates in a traditional wine-tavern format with flamenco nights in a low-ceilinged bodega. Sherry poured directly from the butt; bar snacks of jamon and olives standard.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Santa Maria, 8, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Tabanco San Pablo
wine_bars.address: Calle San Pablo 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Family-run tabanco with Fino, Amontillado and Cream sherry from the barrel; single-bodega supply model from local small producers
wine_bars.description: A neighbourhood tabanco in the heart of Jerez that has operated continuously as a traditional sherry bar. The zinc counter serves sherry by the copita from barrels aligned against the back wall, alongside pintxos.

verified.address_quoted: C/ San Pablo, 12, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Tabanco Las Banderillas
wine_bars.address: Calle Medina 22, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Sherry served from the barrel covering all styles: Fino, Manzanilla, Amontillado, Palo Cortado, Oloroso, Pedro Ximenez; full tapas menu of Jerez specialties
wine_bars.description: A lively central Jerez tabanco combining the traditional from-the-cask serving format with an extensive tapas kitchen. All seven sherry styles on draught; communal tables and an open courtyard for the warm months.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Medina, 22, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Tabanco Plateros
wine_bars.address: Calle Plateros 37, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Traditional from-the-barrel Manzanilla and Fino service from a working bodega supply; shellfish tapas complement the wine list
wine_bars.description: A slim, low-lit tabanco on the Plateros lane, operating in the purist mode: sherry from the barrel, tapas on a chalkboard, benches and barrels for seating. Regulars stand at the narrow bar for the classic aperitivo.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Plateros, 37, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Tabanco El Guitarron de San Pedro
wine_bars.address: Calle Bizcocheros 16, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Classic tabanco with by-the-copita sherry from cask and a flamenco programme most evenings; Lustau and Gonzalez Byass lines alongside smaller family bodegas
wine_bars.description: El Guitarron de San Pedro integrates the tabanco wine format with a dedicated flamenco-cantina atmosphere. Musicians perform traditional cante jondo while guests drink sherry from copitas at antique barrel tables.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Bizcocheros, 16, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Bar Juanito
wine_bars.address: Calle Pescaderia Vieja 8, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Old-school sherry bar with a 30+ sherry list spanning all DO Jerez-Xeres-Sherry styles; famous alccachofa (artichoke) tapas pair with dry Fino and Amontillado
wine_bars.description: A Jerez institution and one of the city's best-known sherry bars, Juanito has been serving sherry alongside its famous tapas menu since 1943. The counter is lined with copita glasses and the list covers every style of the Jerez DO.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Pescaderia Vieja, 8, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Casa Balbino
wine_bars.address: Plaza del Cabildo 14, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: All-Manzanilla and Jerez-focused wine list with particular strength on Sanlucar expressions; tortillitas de camarones paired with chilled Manzanilla the classic order
wine_bars.description: On the main plaza in Sanlucar de Barrameda, Casa Balbino is a long-established tapas bar in the Marco de Jerez triangle. The sherry list focuses on local Manzanilla and Manzanilla Pasada alongside Sanlucar-based producers.

verified.address_quoted: Plaza del Cabildo, 14, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda

wine_bars.name: Taberna der Guerrita
wine_bars.address: Calle Caballeros 7, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Specialist Manzanilla bar with deep list covering small Sanlucar producers and barrel-served Manzanilla from leading bodegas; focus on under-the-radar almacenistas
wine_bars.description: A traditional Sanlucar wine bar dedicated exclusively to Manzanilla and the lighter Fino styles of the Marco de Jerez. The list showcases almacenista single-cask releases unavailable outside the region.

wine_bars.name: La Carbonaria
wine_bars.address: Calle San Francisco de Paula 4, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Enoteca-style sherry bar with 60+ labels by the glass including rare old-solera releases; strong on VORS expressions and almacenista single-casks
wine_bars.description: A contemporary wine bar in central Jerez with the deepest by-the-glass sherry list in the city. VORS and VOSJ expressions sit alongside current releases; the list is organized by style and age category.

verified.address_quoted: C/ San Francisco de Paula, 4, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Bar La Moderna
wine_bars.address: Calle Armas 2, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Traditional sherry and manzanilla bar with by-the-glass selection from Lustau, Fernando de Castilla and local smaller bodegas; full tapas menu and open-air terrace
wine_bars.description: A classic Jerez neighbourhood bar operating in the informal tapas-and-sherry format for decades. The sherry list focuses on quality mid-tier expressions from major houses alongside local almacenista releases.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Armas, 2, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Al Andalus Tapas Bar
wine_bars.address: Calle Consistorio 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Andalusian wine bar specialising in Jerez DO and local Cadiz whites alongside sherry; rotating by-the-glass list with seasonal En Rama editions from local producers
wine_bars.description: Central Jerez tapas bar with a wine focus on the Jerez DO and Cadiz province still whites. The rotating glass list includes seasonal En Rama editions of Fino and Manzanilla from local bodegas.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Consistorio, 12, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Pepe Hillo
wine_bars.address: Calle Valdez 15, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Sherry-focused bar in El Puerto with an emphasis on Osborne and El Puerto-based producers; Manzanilla from Sanlucar alongside local Fino expressions
wine_bars.description: A well-regarded tapas and sherry bar in El Puerto de Santa Maria, one corner of the Marco de Jerez sherry triangle. The list is anchored by Osborne and other local producers, with seasonal En Rama Fino and Manzanilla.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Valdez, 15, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria

wine_bars.name: Enoteca Jerez
wine_bars.address: Calle Pozuelo 4, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Contemporary sherry enoteca with 50+ references by the glass, curated from across the Jerez DO; tutored tastings available alongside the bar service
wine_bars.description: A modern enoteca concept bringing a broader sherry education to central Jerez. The extensive by-the-glass list spans all styles and age categories; staff-led tasting notes accompany each pour on request.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Pozuelo, 4, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Tabanco La Constancia
wine_bars.address: Calle Algarve 35, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Working-class tabanco in the Santiago quarter; Lustau supply direct from the adjacent bodega; all styles from the barrel at daily tabanco prices
wine_bars.description: La Constancia operates in the Santiago quarter adjacent to the Lustau bodega, sourcing sherry directly from the cellar. The tabanco format is entirely traditional: barrels behind the bar, copitas on the counter, no menu beyond a chalkboard.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Algarve, 35, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_bars.name: Bodeguita El Gallo Azul
wine_bars.address: Calle Lanceria 2, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Classic Jerez wine bar on the main pedestrian strip with an all-sherry list featuring 15 open bottles at any time; Amontillado and Oloroso by the 100 ml pour
wine_bars.description: A central Jerez bar on the Lanceria promenade, operating since the mid-20th century. The wine list is strictly local Jerez DO; the house speciality is Amontillado seco served at cellar temperature alongside local cheese.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Lanceria, 2, Jerez de la Frontera
